author: codex-agent

patch.value: Generate unknown-command remediation examples from runtime registry
Replace static unknown-command help examples with runtime-aware suggestions derived from active core and extension command registries.
Unknown-command guidance examples are generated from active runtime command registry and do not reference unavailable extension commands.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence used pm context pm search and open or in-progress lists. Net-new scope under pm-o7be for runtime-aware unknown command remediation examples.

message: Create task for issue #7 runtime-aware unknown command guidance
